channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Threatens to Seize Iranian Oil Export Hub Kharg Island
item.description: President Trump warned the U.S. would strike Iran "very hard" and expressed intent to take control of Kharg Island, Iran's key oil export terminal, as the U.S.-Iran conflict reignites following a shaky ceasefire.

item.title: 💰 U.S., Iran Discuss Frozen Funds as Interim Deal Efforts Intensify
item.description: Despite ongoing strikes, the U.S. and Iran are negotiating how to release frozen Iranian funds as part of efforts to reach an interim deal to end hostilities, with both sides seeking a path to de-escalation.

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB Raises Interest Rates First Time Since 2023 Amid War-Led Inflation
item.description: The European Central Bank raised interest rates by 25 basis points, lifting the deposit rate to 2.25%, aiming to curb inflation before energy cost surges from the Iran war spread across the eurozone economy.

item.title: 🌍 World Bank Cuts Global Growth Forecast to 2.5%, Warns of 1.3% Scenario
item.description: The World Bank reduced its 2026 global growth forecast to 2.5% due to the Middle East war, warning growth could slow to 1.3% if energy supply disruptions spread to financial markets.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine's Drone Commander Plans to Cut Crimea Off From Russia
item.description: Ukraine's drone forces commander is mapping out a campaign to sever Crimea's connection to Russia using extensive battlefield data, targeting supply routes that have already left Crimean fuel stations dry.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Gains Edge in FPV Drone Warfare Against Russia
item.description: Ukraine is outproducing and deploying FPV drones at a 1.5 to 1 ratio compared to Russia, according to Ukrainian military officials. The development marks a shift in the drone war as Kyiv adapts to evolving battlefield needs.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey Mediates Between US and Iran as Conflict Reignites
item.description: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan advised the US and Iran to stop the reignited conflict during diplomatic discussions. The meeting also addressed Black Sea security and EU relations as regional tensions escalate.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia Rupiah Hits Record Low as Fiscal Pressures Mount
item.description: Indonesia rupiah has become Asia worst-performing currency this year as economic pressures mount. The World Bank forecasts GDP growth slowing to 5% in 2026 amid fiscal strains.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices steady as markets assess Hormuz closure fallout
item.description: Oil prices remained nearly flat on Thursday as investors weighed potential supply disruptions from the Middle East conflict after Iran announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz following US military strikes.

item.title: ⛽ Fuel runs dry in Russian-held Crimea as Ukraine strikes supply routes
item.description: Petrol stations in Russian-occupied Sevastopol have run dry after Ukraine stepped up drone attacks on supply routes, forcing authorities to delay rationed fuel distribution to residents.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump vows US will seize Iranian oil hub Kharg Island
item.description: President Trump said the United States would hit Iran 'very hard tonight' and threatened to eventually take control of Kharg Island, Iran's main oil export terminal, as the conflict between Washington and Tehran reignited.

item.title: 🇬🇧⚔️ UK Defense Secretary resigns over military spending dispute with Starmer
item.description: John Healey unexpectedly resigned as UK defense secretary, saying Prime Minister Keir Starmer failed to commit sufficient resources to defense at a time of "rising threats" including the Iran war and Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

item.title: 📉🌍 World Bank slashes global growth forecast to 2.5% on Iran war fallout
item.description: The World Bank cut its 2026 global growth forecast to 2.5% due to the Middle East war, warning growth could slow to just 1.3% if energy supply disruptions prove severe and financial markets face substantial stress.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China bans Philippines defense chief over South China Sea comments
item.description: Beijing has banned Philippines Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro and his family from entering China over his statements calling China's South China Sea claims a "fiction and lie" and criticizing President Xi Jinping's leadership.

item.title: 🇵🇰💰 Pakistan budget hits middle class to meet IMF targets amid Iran war pressure
item.description: Pakistan's government proposed a budget hitting the middle class and registered businesses to raise revenue and cut spending while shielding the poorest, as the Iran war and IMF requirements squeeze the economy.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Approves Record Defense Budget Increase for 2026
item.description: Ukraine is increasing defense and security spending by $34.6 billion, bringing total 2026 expenditures to a record $97.6 billion. The funds will support weapons purchases, military pay, and critical infrastructure protection.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India Demands End to US Ship Attacks After Three Sailors Killed
item.description: Three Indian sailors died in a US military strike on a tanker off Oman as part of Washington's blockade of Iran-linked shipping. India summoned a US diplomat to demand an end to the attacks, calling for dialogue and diplomacy.

item.title: ⚔️ Hegseth's Blocked Promotions Draw Fire From Former Military Leaders
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's targeted blocks on promotions of officers in the Navy and Air Force have intensified scrutiny from former military leaders, who call the moves unprecedented and a corrosive abuse of power. A disproportionate number of the blocked promotions were women or minorities.

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB Raises Interest Rates for First Time Since 2023 to Combat Iran War Inflation
item.description: The European Central Bank increased its deposit rate by 25 basis points to 2.25% as energy-driven inflation from the Iran conflict spreads across the euro zone. The move marks the first rate hike in nearly three years and signals concern about persistent price pressures.

item.title: 💰 Bloomberg Opinion: ECB Jumping at Old Inflation Shadows
item.description: The European Central Bank raised rates to 2.25%, its first hike since 2023, but critics argue the move may be responding to past inflation patterns rather than current economic realities. The decision comes as the Iran war threatens new energy price shocks.

item.title: ⚔️ Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz, Attacks US Bases in Kuwait and Bahrain
item.description: Iran announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz to all vessels and launched retaliatory strikes on US military bases in Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan following American attacks. The escalation marks day 104 of the conflict as tit-for-tat strikes continue.

item.title: 🤖 Ukraine Deploys Ground-Based Drones to Shift Frontline Duties from Soldiers
item.description: Ukraine is increasingly relying on robotic ground drones to punch above its weight on the battlefield, automating logistics and reconnaissance tasks previously handled by soldiers. The technology represents a significant evolution in modern warfare tactics.

item.title: 🇹🇭 Thai court sentences two Uyghur men to death for 2015 Bangkok shrine bombing
item.description: A Thai military court convicted two ethnic Uyghur men from Xinjiang for the 2015 Erawan Shrine bombing that killed 20 people and wounded over 100, delivering death sentences after a nine-year trial.

item.title: 🇮🇹 Italy PM calls for single EU voice in Russia peace talks
item.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni urged European allies to appoint a single representative for talks with Russia to end the Ukraine war, questioning whether smaller groups can represent the entire bloc.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Thai woman faces murder charges in Myanmar for killing of US diplomat
item.description: A Thai woman appeared in a Myanmar court on murder charges in the killing of an American diplomat found dead in Yangon, in a case that could strain diplomatic relations in Southeast Asia.
